p2p_enrich.notes: Found CI commands: bun run type-check (oom), bunx vitest run (works), bun run lint:ts (works via eslint), bun run lint:style (works via prettier). Added 3 p2p repo_tests: test_repo_swr_unit_tests (vitest run src/libs/swr/), test_repo_swr_lint (eslint src/libs/swr/index.ts), test_repo_swr_prettier (prettier --check src/libs/swr/index.ts). All 3 pass on base commit.

rubric_enrichment.rejection_reasons: Rejected: 1) prefer interface over type - not applicable to PR changes; 2) DO NOT modify any code logic (translate-comments.md) - PR intentionally changes code logic as part of the bug fix, not just comment translation; 3-4) Process rules about PR workflow and git branches - not evaluable from code diff

validate.notes: Fixed Dockerfile to install pnpm dependencies. Updated tests/test_outputs.py to use file reading instead of Node.js ESM imports (which had monorepo resolution issues). Fixed solution/solve.sh to use a Python script that reliably applies the patch and runs Prettier for formatting. All 8 tests pass on gold solution, NOP correctly fails on base. Rubric check: linear.mdc has proper frontmatter.
